A captivating attribute of Mckinley Hill is its distinguished master planning exhibited across the entire 50-hectare expanse.

p: Welcome to book.immo. By accessing and using this website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions. If you disagree with any part of these terms, please do not use our website.
You agree to use the website only for lawful purposes. Any unauthorized use of this website may give rise to a claim for damages and/or be a criminal offense.

All content on book.immo, including but not limited to text, images, and logos, is owned by book.immo or its licensors. You may not reproduce, distribute, or commercially exploit any content without prior written permission.
When creating an account, you agree to provide accurate information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account details.
book.immo may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of these sites.

We strive to keep the information on book.immo accurate, but we make no warranties or representations of its accuracy or completeness. book.immo will not be liable for any direct, indirect, or consequential losses arising from the use of this website.
We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your access to book.immo at our sole discretion, without notice or liability, for any reason.
We may update these terms periodically. It is your responsibility to review the terms regularly to ensure you are aware of any changes.
If you have any questions or concerns regarding these terms, please contact us at homfortsupport@gmail.com

/privacy-policy.title: book.immo
/privacy-policy.description: book.immo helps users find, buy, or rent homes with over 2 million listings. This framer real estate template offers expert agent support, customer testimonials, and tailored search filters, aiming to make home searching easy and efficient.
p: book.immo (“we,” “us,” or “our”) values the privacy of our website visitors and clients. This Privacy Policy explains what personal information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding this information. By using our website, you agree to this policy.
We collect the following types of data:
• Personal Information: Name, email address, and contact details when you fill out forms.
• Usage Data: Automatically collected data like IP addresses, browser type, device, and usage patterns through cookies.
We use the information collected to:
• Communicate with you, respond to inquiries, and send updates about our offerings.
• Analyze site traffic to improve user experience.
Cookies are small files stored on your device to track user activity on our website. You can control cookie settings in your browser to accept or decline them.

We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties except for essential service providers (e.g., hosting services) who help maintain the website. These providers follow strict confidentiality agreements.
We take data protection seriously and use appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.
You have the right to request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information at any time. Contact us to exercise these rights.
We may update this privacy policy periodically. Any changes will be posted here, and the date of the last update will be indicated.
For any privacy concerns or questions, feel free to reach out at homfortsupport@gmail.com
